verdict=ALLOW  
reason=PO-1613 release total is 24,750 + 125 freight + 90 tax = 24,965 USD, which is below the 25,000 USD exception_limit; policy POL-PO-25K states to compare net_amount plus release-posted freight and tax against the limit, so no escalation is required (B16-13-SRC-01, B16-13-SRC-02, B16-13-SRC-03, B16-13-SRC-05).
